title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
summary_full: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.
summary_public: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
